description: Composition100% cotton greyish-blue blouson in dobby weave, with short sleeves and a Chinese collar, smock detailing on the bottom and cuff, short buttoned placket with ruffled detailing, and metallic brand badge stitched on the front left side close to the hemFittingRegularWash careGentle machine wash in cool water at 30 CUse mild detergentDo not scrubDo not bleachDo not tumble dryDo not wringDo not dry in direct sunlightCool ironDo not iron directly on print/embroideryWash, dry and iron inside outDo not dry cleanThis greyish-blue blouson from s.oliver is a cool way to beat the heat and look absolutely delicious at the same time. The delicate smock detailing and ruffles add to the feminine charm of this pretty blouse. Pair it with jeans, capris or shorts, and head out looking gorgeous.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.8", Chest-33"
